_meta.scope: All 95 base-game items (001-095). Excludes Jaws of the Lion / Forgotten Circles items (96+).
_meta.spoiler_policy: Items are not deep spoilers. The 'source' field marks shop availability — a tool can hide items whose Prosperity level exceeds state/campaign.json prosperity, and random-item-pool items until drawn.

fields.slot: Head | Body | Legs | One Hand | Two Hands | Small Item
fields.source: Starting (Prosperity 1 shop) | Prosperity N | random item

_meta.caveats: 14 Starting items, then 7 new designs per Prosperity tier 2-9. Items 71-95 are the random-item pool (enter via random draw, not the prosperity shop; some also appear as scenario treasure). Effect text is faithful paraphrase (icons/area diagrams rendered as words), not verbatim card text.

items.effect: During your movement, add +2 Move.
During your movement, add Jump.
On the next two damage sources from attacks, gain Shield 1.
When attacked, the attacker gains Disadvantage.
During your turn, gain Invisible.
During your attack, gain Advantage on the entire Attack action.
When attacked, treat any 2x attack modifier the enemy draws as +0.
When damaged by an attack, gain Shield 1 for the attack.
During your ranged attack, ignore all Shield for the entire Attack action.
During your melee attack, add Stun to the entire Attack action.
During your melee attack, add Poison to a single attack.
During your turn, Heal 3 self.
During your turn, Recover up to two discarded cards.
During your attack, add +1 Attack to the entire Attack action.
At round start (after reveal), shift your leading initiative by 10.
Carry two additional small items.
During your turn, Refresh one consumed small item.
Turn a single-target melee attack into a cone area attack.
During your ranged attack, add Immobilize to a single attack.
During your turn, create any element.
During your attack, add Stun to a single attack.
Immune to all enemy/scenario forced movement.
On the next three damage sources from attacks, gain Shield 1.
During your turn, Heal 1 self.
During your melee attack, add Wound to a single attack.
Turn a single-target melee attack into a line area attack.
During your turn, Heal 5 self.
During your turn, Refresh all spent items.
Default bottom Move 2 becomes Move 3.
When attacked, attacker gains Disadvantage and you gain Shield 1 for the attack.
During your ranged attack, add +1 Range to the entire Attack action.
When damaged by an attack, gain Shield 2 for the attack.
Turn a single-target ranged attack into a cone area attack.
During your turn, Recover up to three discarded cards.
Summon Jade Falcon (Flying).
During your movement, add +3 Move.
During your attack, consume any element for +1 Attack to the entire action.
Immune to Stun and Muddle.
During your ranged attack, add Pull 2 to the entire Attack action.
Default top Attack 2 becomes Attack 3.
During your attack, add +2 Attack to the entire Attack action.
End of turn: play a card and perform its bottom action.
At round start (after reveal), shift your leading initiative by 20.
On the next four damage sources from attacks, gain Shield 1.
Refresh two consumed small items; gain Curse.
When damaged by an attack, gain Shield 1 and Retaliate 2 for the attack.
Turn a single-target melee attack into a cleave area attack.
During your turn, create any two elements.
Refresh all spent items and Heal 3 self.
If you move 1 or fewer hexes, gain Shield 1 for the round.
When damaged by an attack, suffer no damage instead.
Immune to Poison and Wound.
During your melee attack, add Curse to a single attack.
During your ranged attack, consume any element for +1 Attack to the entire action.
During your turn, Heal 7 self.
End of turn: play a card and perform its top action.
Default bottom Move 2 becomes Move 4.
Gain Flying; while in an obstacle hex you are Invisible and cannot attack.
During your ranged attack, add +2 Range to the entire Attack action.
Turn a single-target ranged attack into an area attack; allies in the area suffer 3 damage.
When damaged by an attack, gain Shield 4 for the attack.
During your attack, add Stun, Poison, and Curse to a single attack.
During your turn, Strengthen yourself and all adjacent allies.
During your movement, add +4 Move.
On the next five damage sources from attacks, gain Shield 1.
During your melee attack, add Push 1.
Default top Attack 2 becomes Attack 4.
Single-target melee attack may hit any enemy within 2 hexes.
Refresh all spent items, Heal 3 self, and Recover up to two discarded cards.
End of turn: play two cards for an extra turn this round at the new (later) initiative.
Gain Flying.
If you move 6+ hexes on your turn, gain 1 XP.
During your turn, Move 4 with Jump.
On the next three damage sources from attacks, gain Shield 1 and Retaliate 1.
During your turn, consume any element to create any element.
While adjacent to 3+ monsters, gain Shield 1.
During your melee attack, consume Ice for +2 Attack to a single attack.
During your melee attack, consume Wind for +2 Attack to a single attack.
During your melee attack, consume Fire for +2 Attack to a single attack.
During your melee attack, consume Earth for +2 Attack to a single attack.

During your turn, create Ice.
During your turn, create Wind.
During your turn, create Fire.
During your turn, create Earth.
During your turn, create Light.
During your turn, create Dark.
Remove one negative condition on yourself (usable while Stunned).
Remove all negative conditions on yourself (usable while Stunned).

Before an enemy would consume an element, consume it instead for no effect.
During an ally's attack, add +1 Attack to their entire attack action.
